name: Coffee Maker – Artisan Menu Promo Flyer
svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" viewBox="0 0 1080 1350" width="1080" height="1350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="cf2-bg" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1350" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG_TOP"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG_BOTTOM"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="cf2-banner" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1080" y2="0" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK"/>
      <stop offset="50%"  stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK_MID"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="cf2-oval" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1" gradientUnits="objectBoundingBox">
      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_OVAL_TOP"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_OVAL_BOTTOM"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="cf2-bottom" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1" gradientUnits="objectBoundingBox">
      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK_MID"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <radialGradient id="cf2-glow" cx="50%" cy="45%" r="50%">
      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stop-opacity="0.18"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stop-opacity="0"/>
    </radialGradient>
    <clipPath id="cf2-oval-clip">
      <ellipse cx="540" cy="590" rx="290" ry="340"/>
    </clipPath>
  </defs>

  <!-- LAYER 1: warm bright background -->
  <rect width="1080" height="1350" fill="url(#cf2-bg)"/>

  <!-- LAYER 2: subtle paper texture lines -->
  <line x1="0" y1="220" x2="1080" y2="219" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" stroke-width="0.3" opacity="0.05"/>
  <line x1="0" y1="440" x2="1080" y2="441" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" stroke-width="0.3" opacity="0.04"/>
  <line x1="0" y1="660" x2="1080" y2="659" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" stroke-width="0.3" opacity="0.05"/>
  <line x1="0" y1="880" x2="1080" y2="881" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" stroke-width="0.3" opacity="0.04"/>

  <!-- LAYER 3: ornamental border -->
  <rect x="24" y="24" width="1032" height="1302" fill="none" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" stroke-width="1.2" opacity="0.2"/>
  <rect x="32" y="32" width="1016" height="1286" fill="none" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.2"/>

  <!-- LAYER 4: corner marks -->
  <path d="M24 80 L24 24 L80 24"           fill="none" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.5"/>
  <path d="M1000 24 L1056 24 L1056 80"     fill="none" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.5"/>
  <path d="M24 1270 L24 1326 L80 1326"     fill="none" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.5"/>
  <path d="M1000 1326 L1056 1326 L1056 1270" fill="none" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.5"/>

  <!-- LAYER 5: top arch banner -->
  <rect x="0" y="0" width="1080" height="152" fill="url(#cf2-banner)"/>
  <ellipse cx="540" cy="152" rx="220" ry="38" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK_MID"/>
  <line x1="56" y1="16" x2="1024" y2="16" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="0.6" opacity="0.45"/>
  <line x1="56" y1="22" x2="1024" y2="22" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="0.3" opacity="0.25"/>

  <!-- LAYER 6: store name in banner -->
  <text x="540" y="86"  text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, serif"  font-size="44" font-weight="700" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG_TOP"  letter-spacing="8">PLACEHOLDER_STORE_NAME</text>
  <text x="540" y="124" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="300" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT_LIGHT" letter-spacing="10">PLACEHOLDER_STORE_TAGLINE</text>

  <!-- LAYER 7: divider under banner -->
  <line x1="160" y1="180" x2="920" y2="180" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.2"/>
  <circle cx="540" cy="180" r="5" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.6"/>
  <circle cx="160" cy="180" r="3" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" fill-opacity="0.25"/>
  <circle cx="920" cy="180" r="3" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" fill-opacity="0.25"/>

  <!-- LAYER 8: intro label -->
  <text x="540" y="222" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="12" font-weight="300" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" fill-opacity="0.5" letter-spacing="7">PLACEHOLDER_INTRO_LABEL</text>

  <!-- LAYER 9: oval ornamental rings -->
  <ellipse cx="540" cy="590" rx="318" ry="368" fill="none" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" stroke-width="0.6" opacity="0.12"/>
  <ellipse cx="540" cy="590" rx="306" ry="356" fill="none" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.18"/>
  <ellipse cx="540" cy="590" rx="296" ry="346" fill="none" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.4"/>

  <!-- LAYER 10: dark oval + glow -->
  <ellipse cx="540" cy="590" rx="290" ry="340" fill="url(#cf2-oval)"/>
  <ellipse cx="540" cy="590" rx="290" ry="340" fill="url(#cf2-glow)"/>

  <!-- LAYER 11: product image clipped to oval -->
  <g clip-path="url(#cf2-oval-clip)">
    <image href="PLACEHOLDER_PRODUCT_IMAGE" x="250" y="250" width="580" height="680" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet"/>
  </g>

  <!-- LAYER 12: product name -->
  <text x="540" y="1014" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, serif"  font-size="58" font-weight="700" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK"     letter-spacing="-1">PLACEHOLDER_TITLE_LINE1</text>
  <text x="540" y="1060" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, serif"  font-size="30" font-weight="400" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK_MID" fill-opacity="0.7" font-style="italic" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_TITLE_LINE2</text>

  <!-- LAYER 13: three-star ornamental divider -->
  <line x1="180" y1="1082" x2="420" y2="1082" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" stroke-width="0.6" opacity="0.18"/>
  <text x="540" y="1087" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="14" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.65">PLACEHOLDER_ORNAMENT</text>
  <line x1="660" y1="1082" x2="900" y2="1082" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" stroke-width="0.6" opacity="0.18"/>

  <!-- LAYER 14: features line -->
  <text x="540" y="1118" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="300" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" fill-opacity="0.55" letter-spacing="1.5">PLACEHOLDER_FEATURES_LINE</text>

  <!-- LAYER 15: dark bottom band (price + CTA) — y:1148 to y:1350 -->
  <rect x="0" y="1148" width="1080" height="202" fill="url(#cf2-bottom)"/>
  <line x1="0" y1="1148" x2="1080" y2="1148" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.5"/>

  <!-- LAYER 16: price inside band -->
  <text x="56" y="1210" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif"    font-size="13" font-weight="300" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT_LIGHT" fill-opacity="0.7" letter-spacing="4">PLACEHOLDER_PRICE_LABEL</text>
  <text x="56" y="1278" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, serif"      font-size="78" font-weight="700" fill="#FFFFFF" letter-spacing="-2">PLACEHOLDER_PRICE_VALUE</text>

  <!-- LAYER 17: CTA button inside band -->
  <rect x="56" y="1296" width="380" height="42" rx="0" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT"/>
  <text x="246" y="1324" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, serif" font-size="20" font-weight="700" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_OVAL_BOTTOM" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_CTA_TEXT</text>

  <!-- LAYER 18: footer inside band -->
  <text x="1024" y="1310" text-anchor="end" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="300" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT_LIGHT" fill-opacity="0.55" letter-spacing="1.5">PLACEHOLDER_FOOTER_LINE1</text>
  <text x="1024" y="1332" text-anchor="end" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="300" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT_LIGHT" fill-opacity="0.4"  letter-spacing="1.5">PLACEHOLDER_FOOTER_LINE2</text>
</svg>
